languages.text: Так и не сумев вновь влиться в забывший его Империум, Зарков медленно угасал, погрязнув в собственных дикарских традициях. Спустя годы ничем не примечательной службы и политики изоляции, затерянный полк оказался забыт вновь, на этот раз окончательно.

After failing to reintegrate into the Imperium that had forgotten it, Zarkov slowly faded away, mired in its own barbaric traditions. After years of unremarkable service and a policy of isolation, the lost regiment was forgotten once more — this time, for good.
languages.original_text: Так и не сумев вновь влиться в забывший его Империум, Зарков медленно угасал, погрязнув в собственных дикарских традициях. Спустя годы ничем не примечательной службы и политики изоляции, затерянный полк оказался забыт вновь, на этот раз окончательно.

traits.locale_text: After failing to reintegrate into the Imperium that had forgotten it, Zarkov slowly faded away, mired in its own barbaric traditions. After years of unremarkable service and a policy of isolation, the lost regiment was forgotten once more — this time, for good.

After failing to reintegrate into the Imperium that had forgotten it, Zarkov slowly faded away, mired in its own barbaric traditions. After years of unremarkable service and a policy of isolation, the lost regiment was forgotten once more — this time, for good.

After failing to reintegrate into the Imperium that had forgotten it, Zarkov slowly faded away, mired in its own barbaric traditions. After years of unremarkable service and a policy of isolation, the lost regiment was forgotten once more — this time, for good.

languages.text: かつて自らを忘れ去った帝国への再統合に失敗したザルコフは、自らの野蛮なる伝統に泥み、ゆっくりと衰退していった。見るべきもののない奉仕と孤立政策の幾年もの後、この失われた連隊は再び忘れ去られた――今度は、永遠に。
languages.original_text: After failing to reintegrate into the Imperium that had forgotten it, Zarkov slowly faded away, mired in its own barbaric traditions. After years of unremarkable service and a policy of isolation, the lost regiment was forgotten once more — this time, for good.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフはフォン・ヴァランシウスの保護領の辺境地帯にあり、伝統と新しい可能性の間で揺れ動き、両極端のバランスを見つけることができなかった。
かつて自らを忘れ去った帝国への再統合に失敗したザルコフは、自らの野蛮なる伝統に泥み、ゆっくりと衰退していった。見るべきもののない奉仕と孤立政策の幾年もの後、この失われた連隊は再び忘れ去られた――今度は、永遠に。

languages.text: 扎尔科夫未能重新融入早已将其遗忘的帝国，因而逐渐走向衰落，沉溺于自身的野蛮传统之中。多年来无功无过的服役，以及长期的孤立政策，让这支失落的军团再次被世人遗忘——只不过这一次，是永远的遗忘。
languages.original_text: After failing to reintegrate into the Imperium that had forgotten it, Zarkov slowly faded away, mired in its own barbaric traditions. After years of unremarkable service and a policy of isolation, the lost regiment was forgotten once more — this time, for good.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫未能重新融入早已将其遗忘的帝国，因而逐渐走向衰落，沉溺于自身的野蛮传统之中。多年来无功无过的服役，以及长期的孤立政策，让这支失落的军团再次被世人遗忘——只不过这一次，是永远的遗忘。

languages.text: N'ayant pu réintégrer l'Imperium qui l'avait oubliée, Zarkov s'étiola, en proie à ses propres traditions barbares. Après des années de service quelconque et de politiques isolationnistes, le régiment perdu tomba à nouveau dans l'oubli... pour de bon cette fois.
languages.original_text: After failing to reintegrate into the Imperium that had forgotten it, Zarkov slowly faded away, mired in its own barbaric traditions. After years of unremarkable service and a policy of isolation, the lost regiment was forgotten once more — this time, for good.

traits.locale_text: N'ayant pu réintégrer l'Imperium qui l'avait oubliée, Zarkov s'étiola, en proie à ses propres traditions barbares. Après des années de service quelconque et de politiques isolationnistes, le régiment perdu tomba à nouveau dans l'oubli... pour de bon cette fois.
Zarkov demeura un monde arriéré du protectorat von Valancius. Partagé entre tradition et nouvelles possibilités, il ne parvint jamais vraiment à trouver un équilibre entre ces deux extrêmes.

languages.text: Incapaz de reincorporarse a un Imperium que ya lo había olvidado, Zarkov desapareció gradualmente, ahogado en la barbarie de sus tradiciones. Al cabo de unos años de servicio irrelevante y políticas aislacionistas, el regimiento perdido cayó una vez más en el olvido, esta vez para siempre.
languages.original_text: After failing to reintegrate into the Imperium that had forgotten it, Zarkov slowly faded away, mired in its own barbaric traditions. After years of unremarkable service and a policy of isolation, the lost regiment was forgotten once more — this time, for good.

traits.locale_text: Incapaz de reincorporarse a un Imperium que ya lo había olvidado, Zarkov desapareció gradualmente, ahogado en la barbarie de sus tradiciones. Al cabo de unos años de servicio irrelevante y políticas aislacionistas, el regimiento perdido cayó una vez más en el olvido, esta vez para siempre.

languages.text: Kendisini unutan İmparatorluk'a yeniden entegre olmayı başaramayan Zarkov, kendi barbarca geleneklerine saplanıp kalarak yavaş yavaş silinip gitti. Yıllarca süren sıradan hizmetin ve izolasyon politikasının ardından kayıp alay, bir kez daha unutuldu. Ancak bu kez sonsuza dek.
languages.original_text: After failing to reintegrate into the Imperium that had forgotten it, Zarkov slowly faded away, mired in its own barbaric traditions. After years of unremarkable service and a policy of isolation, the lost regiment was forgotten once more — this time, for good.

traits.locale_text: Kendisini unutan İmparatorluk'a yeniden entegre olmayı başaramayan Zarkov, kendi barbarca geleneklerine saplanıp kalarak yavaş yavaş silinip gitti. Yıllarca süren sıradan hizmetin ve izolasyon politikasının ardından kayıp alay, bir kez daha unutuldu. Ancak bu kez sonsuza dek.

languages.text: Nach der gescheiterten Wiedereingliederung in das Imperium, das ihn vergessen hatte, versank Zarkov in seinen eigenen barbarischen Traditionen. Nach Jahren unscheinbaren Dienstes und einer Politik der Isolation geriet das vergessene Regiment erneut in Vergessenheit ... dieses Mal endgültig.
languages.original_text: After failing to reintegrate into the Imperium that had forgotten it, Zarkov slowly faded away, mired in its own barbaric traditions. After years of unremarkable service and a policy of isolation, the lost regiment was forgotten once more — this time, for good.

traits.locale_text: Nach der gescheiterten Wiedereingliederung in das Imperium, das ihn vergessen hatte, versank Zarkov in seinen eigenen barbarischen Traditionen. Nach Jahren unscheinbaren Dienstes und einer Politik der Isolation geriet das vergessene Regiment erneut in Vergessenheit ... dieses Mal endgültig.
